site.name: Team Fusion
site.tagline: AI automation that feels like magic.
site.heroLead: I design and build intelligent systems that quietly do the work for you — from autonomous agents to data pipelines that simply flow.

about.title: About
body: I'm an AI automation specialist crafting systems that think, decide, and act — so you can focus on the work that only you can do.

For the past several years I've been building with LLMs, vector databases, orchestration frameworks and the messy real-world APIs that tie everything together. The result is quiet, reliable automation that your team forgets is even there.

services.title: AI Agents & Assistants
services.description: Custom autonomous agents that handle research, support, outreach, and internal operations — with the judgment of a teammate and the patience of a machine.

services.title: Workflow Automation
services.description: End-to-end automations across the tools you already use. Triggers, branching logic, human-in-the-loop — orchestrated beautifully.

services.title: Data Pipelines & RAG
services.description: Ingest, chunk, embed, retrieve. Production-grade retrieval systems that give your models the right context, every time.

services.title: Custom Integrations
services.description: Bespoke connectors between your stack and any AI model — OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source, or your own fine-tuned models.

work.title: Seraph Support Desk
work.summary: A tiered AI support agent resolving 72% of tickets end-to-end for a SaaS with 20k customers.

work.title: Lumen Ops Pipeline
work.summary: Document-to-decision pipeline turning 4-hour analyst reviews into 3-minute briefings.

work.title: Nimbus Outreach
work.summary: Personalized outbound engine that writes, schedules, and follows up — 5x reply rate vs. templates.

work.title: Oracle Dash
work.summary: Natural-language BI layer over a 200-table warehouse. Ask in English, get charts and SQL.

work.title: Helios Intake
work.summary: Voice + form AI intake for a legal practice. Structured data in, qualified leads out.

work.title: Aurora Editor
work.summary: Internal content studio blending human drafts with model suggestions — shipped 3x more copy.

testimonials.quote: It felt like watching our operations learn to breathe on their own. Everything just… flowed.
testimonials.author: Maya Chen

testimonials.quote: We replaced four brittle scripts with one elegant automation. I keep forgetting it's running.
testimonials.author: Daniel Ortiz

testimonials.quote: The agent handled a weekend surge while the team slept. I woke up to a clean queue.
testimonials.author: Priya Rao
